feminine.en: The dress has a soft, feminine style.
feminine.zh: 這件洋裝有柔美、女性化的風格。

fertility.en: Good soil increases the land's fertility.
fertility.zh: 好的土壤能提高土地的肥沃度。

fertilizer.en: Farmers spread fertilizer on the fields.

fianc-fiance.en: She introduced her fiance to her parents.
fianc-fiance.zh: 她把未婚夫介紹給父母。

fin.en: A shark's fin cut through the water.

finite.en: We have a finite amount of time.

firecracker.en: Children lit firecrackers for the festival.

fishery.en: The fishery provides jobs for the town.
fishery.zh: 漁業為這個小鎮提供工作。

flake.en: Flakes of snow fell on the roof.

flaw.en: There is a small flaw in the plan.

flourish.zh: 這門生意開始興旺起來。

flunk.en: He was afraid he would flunk the test.
flunk.zh: 他擔心自己會考不及格。

foe.en: They were once foes but became friends.
foe.zh: 他們曾經是敵人，後來成了朋友。

folklore.en: The story comes from local folklore.
folklore.zh: 這個故事來自當地的民間傳說。

formidable.zh: 他們面對一個強大的對手。

formulate.zh: 她制定了一個明確的計畫。

forsake.en: A true friend will not forsake you.
forsake.zh: 真正的朋友不會拋棄你。

forthcoming.en: We are excited about the forthcoming concert.
forthcoming.zh: 我們對即將到來的演唱會很期待。

fortify.en: They fortified the wall with stone.
fortify.zh: 他們用石頭加固了城牆。

fowl.en: Chickens and ducks are kinds of fowl.

fracture.en: The X-ray showed a fracture in his arm.
fracture.zh: X光顯示他的手臂有骨折。

fragrance.en: The flowers gave off a sweet fragrance.
fragrance.zh: 這些花散發出甜美的香氣。

fragrant.en: The garden was full of fragrant roses.
fragrant.zh: 花園裡開滿了芬芳的玫瑰。

frantic.en: She made a frantic search for her keys.
frantic.zh: 她瘋狂地尋找她的鑰匙。

freak.en: The sudden snow was a freak event.
freak.zh: 這場突如其來的雪是個反常的事件。

freeway.en: Traffic was heavy on the freeway.

friction.en: Rubbing your hands creates friction and heat.

fume.en: Car fumes pollute the city air.
fume.zh: 汽車廢氣污染了城市的空氣。

fury.en: He shook with fury at the news.
fury.zh: 聽到那消息他氣得發抖。

fuse.en: The fuse blew and the lights went out.
fuse.zh: 保險絲燒斷了，燈就熄了。

fuss.en: Don't make a fuss over a small mistake.
fuss.zh: 別為了一個小錯誤大驚小怪。

gallop.en: The horse broke into a fast gallop.

gangster.en: The film is about a famous gangster.
gangster.zh: 這部電影是關於一個有名的幫派分子。

garment.en: Each garment is sewn by hand.
garment.zh: 每件衣服都是手工縫製的。

geographical.zh: 這張地圖顯示了地理特徵。

geometry.en: We study shapes and angles in geometry.
geometry.zh: 我們在幾何學中研究形狀和角度。

glacier.en: A huge glacier slid slowly down the valley.
glacier.zh: 一條巨大的冰河沿著山谷緩緩滑下。

glamorous.en: The star looked glamorous on the red carpet.
glamorous.zh: 明星在紅毯上看起來光彩動人。

glamour.en: The city is full of glamour and lights.
glamour.zh: 這座城市充滿魅力與燈光。

gleam.en: A gleam of hope shone in her eyes.

glide.en: The bird glided smoothly through the air.
glide.zh: 那隻鳥平穩地滑翔過空中。

glitter.en: The lake seemed to glitter in the sun.
glitter.zh: 湖面在陽光下閃閃發亮。

gloom.en: A sense of gloom filled the room.
gloom.zh: 房間裡瀰漫著一股陰鬱的氣氛。

goodwill.en: The gift was a sign of goodwill.
goodwill.zh: 這份禮物是善意的表示。

gorilla.en: The gorilla sat quietly in its enclosure.
gorilla.zh: 大猩猩安靜地坐在牠的圍欄裡。

gospel.en: The choir sang a joyful gospel song.
gospel.zh: 唱詩班唱了一首歡樂的福音歌曲。

grapefruit.en: She had half a grapefruit for breakfast.
grapefruit.zh: 她早餐吃了半顆葡萄柚。

graze.en: Sheep graze on the green hillside.
graze.zh: 綿羊在綠色的山坡上吃草。

grease.en: The pan was covered in grease.

groan.en: He gave a groan as he lifted the box.
groan.zh: 他抬箱子時發出一聲呻吟。

growl.en: The dog gave a low growl.
growl.zh: 那隻狗發出低沉的咆哮。

grumble.en: He grumbled about the cold weather.

hacker.en: A hacker tried to break into the system.
hacker.zh: 一名駭客試圖入侵系統。

hail.en: Hail fell during the sudden storm.
hail.zh: 突如其來的暴風雨中下起了冰雹。

hamper.zh: 惡劣的天氣阻礙了救援。

handicap.en: His injury was a handicap in the race.
handicap.zh: 他的傷在比賽中是個不利條件。

handicraft.en: She sells handicrafts at the market.

harass.en: It is wrong to harass others online.
harass.zh: 在網路上騷擾別人是不對的。

harden.en: The clay hardens as it dries.

harmonica.en: He played a tune on his harmonica.
harmonica.zh: 他用口琴吹了一首曲子。

harness.en: They put a harness on the horse.

haunt.en: People say a ghost haunts the old house.
haunt.zh: 人們說有鬼在那棟老房子出沒。

headphone.en: She listened to music with headphones.

healthful.en: Fruit and vegetables are healthful foods.
healthful.zh: 水果和蔬菜是健康的食物。

hearty.en: They gave us a hearty welcome.

hedge.en: A green hedge surrounds the garden.
hedge.zh: 一道綠色的樹籬圍繞著花園。

heighten.zh: 音樂加強了緊張的氣氛。

hemisphere.en: Australia is in the southern hemisphere.

heroic.en: The firefighter made a heroic rescue.
heroic.zh: 消防員進行了英勇的救援。

heroin.en: Heroin is a dangerous and illegal drug.
heroin.zh: 海洛因是一種危險的非法毒品。

heterosexual.en: The survey asked about sexual orientation, including heterosexual people.
heterosexual.zh: 這份調查詢問性傾向，包括異性戀者。

hierarchy.en: The army has a clear hierarchy.
hierarchy.zh: 軍隊有清楚的階級制度。

hijack.en: In the film, robbers hijack a train.
hijack.zh: 在電影裡，盜賊劫持了一列火車。

hoarse.en: Her voice was hoarse from cheering.
hoarse.zh: 她因為歡呼而聲音沙啞。

homosexual.en: The law protects homosexual people from discrimination.
homosexual.zh: 法律保護同性戀者免於歧視。

honorary.en: The university gave him an honorary degree.
honorary.zh: 這所大學頒給他一個榮譽學位。

hospitable.en: Our hosts were warm and hospitable.
hospitable.zh: 我們的主人既熱情又好客。

hospitality.en: Thank you for your kind hospitality.

hospitalize.en: He was hospitalized after the accident.

hostel.en: We stayed at a cheap youth hostel.
hostel.zh: 我們住在一間便宜的青年旅館。

hover.en: A bee hovered over the flower.
hover.zh: 一隻蜜蜂在花朵上方盤旋。

humiliate.en: It is cruel to humiliate someone.

hunch.en: I had a hunch that he would win.

hurdle.en: She jumped the last hurdle and won.
hurdle.zh: 她跨過最後一個欄架，贏得了比賽。

hybrid.en: The car is a hybrid that uses less gas.
hybrid.zh: 這輛車是省油的油電混合車。

hygiene.zh: 良好的衛生習慣有助於預防疾病。

hypocrite.en: He is a hypocrite who says one thing and does another.
hypocrite.zh: 他是個說一套做一套的偽君子。

iceberg.en: The ship hit a huge iceberg.
iceberg.zh: 這艘船撞上了一座巨大的冰山。

imminent.en: Dark clouds warned of imminent rain.

imperative.en: It is imperative to stay calm.

implicit.en: There was an implicit warning in his tone.
implicit.zh: 他的語氣中帶著一個隱含的警告。

imposing.en: The imposing tower stood over the city.
imposing.zh: 那座雄偉的塔俯視著城市。

imprison.en: They imprisoned the thief for a year.

incline.en: The road inclines steeply up the hill.
incline.zh: 這條路沿著山坡陡峭地往上傾斜。

inclusive.en: The price is inclusive of breakfast.

incur.en: Late payment will incur a fee.

indifference.zh: 他的漠不關心傷了她的心。

indignant.en: She was indignant at the unfair treatment.
indignant.zh: 她對不公平的對待感到憤慨。

industrialize.en: The country began to industrialize quickly.
industrialize.zh: 這個國家開始快速工業化。

infer.en: From his smile, I inferred he was happy.
infer.zh: 從他的笑容，我推斷他很開心。

inflict.zh: 暴風雨造成了嚴重的損害。

inhabit.zh: 許多鳥棲息在這座森林裡。

inhabitant.zh: 這個城鎮有五千名居民。

inland.zh: 這條河流向遙遠的內陸。

innumerable.en: There are innumerable stars in the sky.

inquire.en: She inquired about the train times.

insistence.en: At his insistence, we left early.
insistence.zh: 在他的堅持下，我們提早離開了。

instinctive.en: A baby's cry is an instinctive response.
instinctive.zh: 嬰兒的哭聲是一種本能的反應。

intake.en: You should reduce your sugar intake.
intake.zh: 你應該減少糖的攝取量。

intellect.en: She is admired for her sharp intellect.
intellect.zh: 她因敏銳的才智而受人欽佩。

interpreter.zh: 口譯員翻譯了那場演說。

intersection.en: Turn right at the next intersection.

intervene.en: A teacher intervened to stop the fight.
intervene.zh: 一位老師介入阻止了打架。

intimacy.en: The quiet dinner created a sense of intimacy.
intimacy.zh: 安靜的晚餐營造出親密的氣氛。

intimidate.en: Don't let big words intimidate you.

intonation.en: Her rising intonation showed a question.
intonation.zh: 她上揚的語調表示這是個問句。

intrigue.en: The story is full of mystery and intrigue.
intrigue.zh: 這個故事充滿了神秘與懸疑。

intrude.en: I'm sorry to intrude on your meeting.

intruder.en: The dog barked at the intruder.
intruder.zh: 那隻狗對著入侵者吠叫。

invaluable.en: Her advice was invaluable to me.
invaluable.zh: 她的建議對我來說極為寶貴。

invariably.en: He is invariably late for class.

ironic.en: It is ironic that the fire station burned down.
ironic.zh: 諷刺的是，消防局竟然被燒毀了。

irritable.en: He gets irritable when he is hungry.
irritable.zh: 他餓的時候容易變得暴躁。

isle.en: They sailed to a small green isle.
isle.zh: 他們航向一座綠色的小島。

itch.en: The mosquito bite made my arm itch.
itch.zh: 蚊子叮咬讓我的手臂發癢。

ivy.en: Green ivy covered the old wall.
ivy.zh: 綠色的常春藤爬滿了那道老牆。

jade.en: She wore a beautiful jade necklace.
jade.zh: 她戴著一條美麗的玉項鍊。

jasmine.en: The night air smelled of jasmine.
jasmine.zh: 夜晚的空氣中飄著茉莉花香。

jingle.en: The keys jingled in his pocket.
jingle.zh: 鑰匙在他口袋裡叮噹作響。

jockey.en: The jockey rode the horse to victory.
jockey.zh: 騎師騎著馬贏得了勝利。

jolly.en: He is a jolly old man who loves to laugh.
jolly.zh: 他是個愛笑的快樂老人。

joyous.en: It was a joyous reunion for the family.
joyous.zh: 那是一場歡樂的家庭團聚。

junction.en: Their roads meet at a busy junction.
junction.zh: 他們的路在一個繁忙的交叉口交會。

kin.en: He returned home to be with his kin.

kindle.en: She used dry leaves to kindle the fire.

knowledgeable.en: The guide was knowledgeable about the history.
knowledgeable.zh: 這位導遊對歷史很有見識。

lad.en: The young lad helped carry the bags.
lad.zh: 那個年輕小伙子幫忙提袋子。

landslide.en: Heavy rain caused a landslide on the hill.
landslide.zh: 大雨在山坡上引發了土石流。

latitude.en: The town lies at a high latitude.
latitude.zh: 這個城鎮位於高緯度地區。

lavish.en: They held a lavish wedding party.
lavish.zh: 他們舉辦了一場奢華的婚宴。

layman.en: The doctor explained it in layman's terms.
layman.zh: 醫生用外行人也懂的話來解釋。

layout.en: She designed the layout of the page.
layout.zh: 她設計了這個頁面的版面。

lease.en: They signed a two-year lease on the flat.
lease.zh: 他們簽了公寓兩年的租約。

legislator.zh: 立法者討論了這項新法案。

lengthy.en: The meeting was long and lengthy.

lesbian.en: The film tells the story of a lesbian couple.
lesbian.zh: 這部電影講述一對女同志伴侶的故事。

lessen.en: A warm drink can lessen the pain.
lessen.zh: 溫熱的飲料能減輕疼痛。

lethal.zh: 這種蛇的毒液是致命的。

liable.en: He is liable to forget without a reminder.
liable.zh: 沒有提醒他就容易忘記。

liberation.en: They celebrated the liberation of the town.

lieutenant.en: The lieutenant led a small group of soldiers.
lieutenant.zh: 中尉帶領著一小隊士兵。

lifelong.zh: 他們是一輩子的好朋友。

lighten.zh: 幫忙減輕了她的工作量。

limp.en: He walked with a limp after the fall.
limp.zh: 跌倒後他走路一拐一拐的。

liner.en: A huge ocean liner sailed into port.
liner.zh: 一艘巨大的遠洋客輪駛入港口。

linger.en: The smell of coffee lingered in the room.
linger.zh: 咖啡的香味在房間裡久久不散。
